<result>## Fixes Applied

- **`apps/web/src/app/(app)/plan/use-workout-session.ts:225-330`** (FIX 1, CRITICAL) — `runFlushPass` now: (a) checks a new `connectivityRef` (holding the same `ConnectivityMonitor` instance the reconnect-subscriber effect creates) and returns immediately if `isOnline()` is false, before calling `getIdentityKey()` or anything network-shaped; (b) wraps the identity recheck in try/catch — a thrown/rejected/`undefined` result is treated as retryable/UNREACHABLE (abort silently, queue stays intact, no unhandled rejection), and is explicitly NOT treated as a confirmed identity switch. Only a resolved, defined, DIFFERENT key still triggers the original fix-#6 mismatch-abort. `connectivityRef` is populated in the existing connectivity `useEffect` (`use-workout-session.ts:317-326`).
- **`apps/web/src/app/(app)/plan/offline/identity.ts:38-59`** (FIX 2, WARNING) — `clearIdentityScope` now also calls `clearActiveSessionPointer(store, identityKey)` (imported from `./snapshot`) so the purged identity's `activeSessionId` meta pointer no longer leaks.
- **`apps/web/src/app/(app)/plan/use-workout-session.ts:243-253`** (FIX 3, MINOR) — the empty-queue early return now clears transient `syncNotice`s (`auth_required`/`reload_required`) via `setSyncNotice((prev) => (prev === "dropped" ? prev : undefined))`, keeping `dropped` sticky per the chosen design (permanent data loss stays visible).

## New offline-path regression tests (strict TDD, confirmed red before fix, green after)

- `apps/web/src/app/(app)/plan/__tests__/use-workout-session.offline.test.ts` — added:
  - "never calls getIdentityKey (or dispatches a Server Action) for a flush-triggered write while offline" — asserts `getIdentityKey` call count stays at 1 (mount only), no Server Action dispatched, mutation stays queued, and no `process` `unhandledRejection` fires.
  - "aborts a flush pass without an unhandled rejection when the identity recheck itself rejects" — device reports online but `getIdentityKey` rejects on the recheck; asserts no dispatch, mutation stays queued, no unhandled rejection.
  - "clears an auth_required notice once a clean flush pass finds the queue empty" — drains the queue out-of-band then re-triggers flush; asserts `syncNotice` clears via the genuinely-empty-queue branch (not a coincidental success-path clear).
  - "keeps a dropped notice sticky across a subsequent clean empty-queue pass".
- `apps/web/src/app/(app)/plan/offline/__tests__/identity.test.ts` — added "clears the previous identity's activeSessionId pointer on purge".

To confirm red, I manually reconstructed the pre-fix file content (since `git stash` on the single tracked file reverted the entire uncommitted offline slice to the last commit — I caught this immediately and `git stash pop`'d, then used manually-swapped copies instead) and re-ran the 4 new/changed tests: all failed as expected, then passed after restoring the fixes.
